'''鈭歮-n-sh-k''' ('''kamanshekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woo|woo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woo|woo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-n-sh-k
|-
! Lemma
| kamanshekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimanshekoko|thimanshekoko]] || [[word:jimanshekoko|jimanshekoko]] || [[word:shimanshekoko|shimanshekoko]] || [[word:kimanshekoko|kimanshekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumanshekoko|thuthumanshekoko]] || [[word:jujumanshekoko|jujumanshekoko]] || [[word:shushumanshekoko|shushumanshekoko]] || [[word:kukumanshekoko|kukumanshekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomanshekoko|thomanshekoko]] || [[word:jomanshekoko|jomanshekoko]] || [[word:shomanshekoko|shomanshekoko]] || [[word:komanshekoko|komanshekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙manshekoko|th忙manshekoko]] || [[word:j忙manshekoko|j忙manshekoko]] || [[word:sh忙manshekoko|sh忙manshekoko]] || [[word:k忙manshekoko|k忙manshekoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamanshekoko|thamanshekoko]] || [[word:jamanshekoko|jamanshekoko]] || [[word:shamanshekoko|shamanshekoko]] || [[word:kamanshekoko|kamanshekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamanshekoko|thamanshekoko]] || [[word:jamanshekoko|jamanshekoko]] || [[word:shamanshekoko|shamanshekoko]] || [[word:kamanshekoko|kamanshekoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
